title: Stronger Skill Tree (Unlock All)
description:
Version of "Stronger Skill Tree" for those who don't like choices or just want to become REALLY strong!
needs pufferfish's skills
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76d2ed3a89c5f0e9b8b51a2fd560dd15a7df9f5e_0.webp)

**THIS IS A VERSION OF THE [Stronger Skill Tree](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stronger-skill-tree-for-pufferfishs-skills) THAT REMOVES THE CHOICE AND UNLOCKS ALL PATHS**

This is a skill tree for the mod [Pufferfish's skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills)
It also needs [pufferfish's attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/attributes).

It has 3 trees (Combat, Mining, Chopping wood) with Combat being the most intresting.
The Combat tree starts with 3 different paths to choose Which divide into 6 Paths
<details>
<summary>The Combat paths are:</summary>
  
  1 Melee             [Melee dmg, Hp, Att speed, Healing].
  
  2 Ranged            [Ranged dmg, Jump boost, Att speed, Stamina].
  
  3 Physical Strength [Luck, Sprinting speed, Jump boost, Hp].
  

The 6 other paths are combinations of the 3 previous ones.

</details>

<details>
<summary>The Mining tree contains:</summary>
  
- Mining speed
  
- Pickaxe speed
  
- Anvil repair cost
  
- Fortune
  
</details>


<details>
<summary>The Wood chopping tree contains:</summary>

- Axe speed

- Mining speed

- Knockback


</details>

**WARNING IF YOU COMPLETE THE TREE YOU WILL BE VERY STRONG**

So if you don't like that or get bored it is suggested to download a mod like [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpgdifficulty).

**How to play?**
Earn skill xp by:
- Killing mobs
- Mining ores
- Chopping wood
  
With enough xp you will get a skill point to spend on a skill.
  Press K to open the skill tree with standard controlls

**Modpacks**

You may use this mod in a modpack

**Bugs, Questions and Suggestions**

If you find a bug or have questions, you can tell me in the discord server
If you have a suggestion you can tell me personally
